description_long: This is a small, vibrantly colored parrot with a predominantly yellow body and green-tipped wings. Its head and upper chest are a rich orange, blending into yellow on the lower body and tail. The bird has a short, strong, black beak and expressive white eye-rings that contrast with its orange face. The tail is long and tapered, with a mix of yellow and dark blue or black feathers at the tip. Its legs and feet are pale gray, and the overall feather pattern is smooth with subtle gradients between colors. The bird's compact, rounded form and vivid coloration make it highly noticeable in any urban park or garden.
description: A small, vividly colored parrot with a yellow body, orange head, green wings, and a long, tapered tail. It features a black beak, white eye-rings, and subtle color gradients across its feathers.
description_view_0: Side view showing the orange head, yellow body, green wings, and long tail with dark tip; the black beak and white eye-ring are clearly visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the symmetrical yellow back, green wing feathers, and the full length of the tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with the same color transitions and visible beak and eye-ring.
description_view_3: Front view showing the orange face, both white eye-rings, black beak, and the bird's feet beneath its body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid yellow body with orange face and upper chest, green-tipped wings, and dark-tipped tail; smooth color gradients between regions.
